---
title: "Mapping out the future of cycling"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2016). Mapping out the future of cycling. *Get Britain Cycling*."
date: "2016-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_mapping_2016"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Get Britain Cycling"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Get Britain Cycling
**Year:** 2016

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2016). Mapping out the future of cycling. *Get Britain Cycling*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_mapping_2016,
  title = {Mapping out the Future of Cycling},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2016},
  journal = {Get Britain Cycling},
  volume = {5},
  pages = {22--24},
  urldate = {2016-06-08},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  file = {/home/robin/Zotero/storage/84X46AAD/Get_Britain_Cycling_2016_PCT.pdf}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
